title: puccinellia geniculata
intro: Puccinellia geniculata, also known as bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to various parts of the world, including Europe, Asia, and North America. Puccinellia geniculata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin infections. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are said to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
